LAW AND MOTION 302, JUN-27-2023. HEARING RE: DEFENDANT TOM M. KU'S MOTION TO VACATE RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT UNDER CCP 683.170. THE ISSUE OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT IS DISCUSSED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, DEFENDANT TOM M. KU'S MOTION TO VACATE RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT UNDER CCP 683.170 IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And To Vacate The Renewal Of Judgment Entered On April 26, 2013
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: Defendant Tom M. Ku's motion to vacate renewal of judgment under CCP 683.170.

Appearances:

Rachel Haney, Esq., via Zoom, Gurstel Law Firm, P.C., (877) 344-4002, for Plaintiff.

Tom M. Ku, in person, in propria persona Defendant.

Ruling - ARGUED. The issue of whether service on Defendant is proper is discussed. At the conclusion of argument, the court takes Defendant Tom M. Ku's motion to vacate renewal of judgment under CCP 683.170 is taken under submission.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order to the court.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
